description: After Cal and Skye's initial bonding, Skye sets Cal up to search for ice cream and secretly calls May to arrange S.H.I.E.L.D.'s intervention. The situation becomes fraught when Skye realizes she's potentially endangered Cal by contacting May, who is now working for those hunting Coulson. Cal continues to reminisce about the past and suggests showing Skye something important at his old office.

transcript.line: Actually, there is something that needs your attention right now. It's Ethan.
Ethan? I thought you dropped him off on a camping trip.
I did, but when I went to bring him back, he was gone. I can't find him anywhere.
Are you saying he's missing... or worse?
I'm not sure. But... even if they knew... who he was, that he was one of us. How can they get ahold of him?
Right now I'm not concerned with how as much as who.
